description:
This image captures a serene night scene in a room bathed in the soft glow of ambient light filtering through two windows adorned with yellow curtains. The room, painted in a soothing shade of green, exudes an air of tranquility. 

A window on the left side of the room stands out with its curtain drawn back, allowing a peek into another world beyond. On the right side of the room, another window is partially veiled by a white curtain, adding to the room's cozy atmosphere.

The room is illuminated not only by the light from the windows but also by the ambient light that subtly bathes the entire space in a warm glow. The overall color palette of the image leans towards shades of green and yellow, creating a harmonious blend that complements the room's ambiance.

Despite being a still image, it paints a vivid picture of tranquility and peace, inviting one to step into this world and lose themselves in its comforting embrace.
